extracted_information: The provided web content focuses on metered billing software solutions for SaaS companies, detailing their importance, key features, and specific examples. It addresses usage tracking, metering systems, real-time monitoring, and billing integration within this context.

features.description: Enables usage-based pricing models in SaaS, crucial for flexibility and personalization.
key_features: Precise tracking and billing of billable events (e.g., API calls, storage, usage minutes)
Real-time billing and updates for customers
Scalability to handle growing customer bases and usage data
Crystal-clear transparency through detailed usage and billing reports
importance: Addresses shortcomings of legacy billing systems that struggle with usage-based billing.
Prevents revenue leakage and billing errors.
Empowers SaaS companies to embrace future pricing strategies and ensure profit margins.

details: **Precise tracking and billing:** Metered billing software ensures capture of value delivered to customers by tracking billable events.
**Real-time usage tracking:** Provides instant updates and notifications for customers, building trust.
**Integration with data sources:** Solutions like Orb integrate with popular data sources (e.g., S3, Segment) and flexible REST APIs to collect and analyze usage data.
**Custom metric definition:** Allows businesses to define and track specific usage metrics relevant to their product (e.g., API calls, storage, feature interactions).

features.details: The core of the discussion is 'metered billing software', which functions as the metering system for SaaS. It handles the collection, processing, and application of usage data for billing purposes.

details: **Real-time billing:** A core feature, processing data in real-time to provide up-to-the-minute billing information and instant updates.
**Real-time usage tracking (Orb):** Gives users visibility into their usage and costs immediately, reducing billing surprises.
**Automated billing workflow:** Metered billing software automates processes from usage tracking and calculations to invoicing and revenue recognition.
**Integration with application stack:** Solutions like Orb integrate usage data from across the application stack.
**Support for complex contract terms:** Maxio handles complex B2B SaaS contracts and automates GAAP-compliant revenue recognition.

**Subscription management:** Platforms like Recurly and Chargebee, while primarily subscription management tools, incorporate metered billing by defining usage metrics and automating invoicing based on consumption.

references.title: The 6 most effective metered billing software for SaaS companies | 2025
